text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Silence Suzuka sounds half asleep as she murmurs
under her breath.

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text: Yawn... A trip would be... so nice...

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text:
Rolling plains carpeted with verdant grass, and
auroras dancing above in the sky...

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text:
I've been watching videos of scenery taken from
all around the world recently.

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text: My legs tingle just thinking about those vistas...

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text: Sigh... But before I knew it, it was already morning.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
It seems Silence Suzuka was so enthralled by the
videos, it cut into her sleep. She certainly looks a
little tired.
